scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npx esbuild src/content/content-script.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --target=chrome120 --minify && npx esbuild src/content/webauthn-page.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/webauthn-page.js --format=iife --target=chrome120 --minify && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('dist', '/mnt/d/pwbook-edge-dist', {recursive:true, force:true})"
